# KineticReaction { #reactix.KineticReaction }

```python
KineticReaction()
```

Abstract base class for kinetic reactions in reactive transport.

This class defines the interface for implementing kinetic reactions
that can be coupled with transport equations. Subclasses must implement
the rate method and define stoichiometry.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

| Name          | Type             | Description                                                                                                                                                  |
|---------------|------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| stoichiometry | dict or callable | Reaction stoichiometry mapping species names to coefficients. Can be a dict for constant stoichiometry or a callable for time/state-dependent stoichiometry. |

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Reactions are evaluated using the _eval_dcdt method, which computes
the rate of change of species concentrations based on the reaction rate
and stoichiometry.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [rate](#reactix.KineticReaction.rate) | Compute the reaction rate. |

### rate { #reactix.KineticReaction.rate }

```python
KineticReaction.rate(time, state, system)
```

Compute the reaction rate.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type            | Description                     | Default    |
|--------|-----------------|---------------------------------|------------|
| time   | jax.Array       | Current time.                   | _required_ |
| state  | AbstractSpecies | Current species concentrations. | _required_ |
| system | System          | The transport system.           | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type      | Description        |
|--------|-----------|--------------------|
|        | jax.Array | The reaction rate. |
